servicesList.title: Everything Your Project Needs, In One Place

serviceRows.constructionDesc: We provide high-quality construction and contracting services with a strong focus on safety, precision, and timely project delivery, from groundworks to finishing.
serviceRows.rentalDesc: We offer a wide range of modern heavy equipment to support various project requirements with efficiency, reliability, and optimal performance — with or without operators.
serviceRows.transportDesc: We provide safe and efficient transportation of goods and materials through a reliable fleet of trucks, ensuring timely delivery and secure handling.
serviceRows.manpowerDesc: We supply qualified workers, skilled labor, and experienced drivers to support different types and scales of projects — from plumbers to welders and steel fixers.
serviceRows.integratedDesc: We deliver complete, end-to-end project solutions tailored to client needs, ensuring smooth execution and high operational efficiency across every phase.

detail.earthworksDesc: Excavation, grading, backfilling and site clearance handled by trained operators using excavators and backhoe loaders.
detail.liftingDesc: Mobile cranes, telehandlers, manlifts and scissor lifts for structural erection, installation and maintenance at height.
detail.haulageDesc: Fleet of dump trucks and flatbeds for transporting aggregates, equipment and construction materials across the Kingdom.
detail.powerDesc: Diesel generators and site utility equipment ensuring uninterrupted power supply for remote or off-grid job sites.
detail.skilledManpowerDesc: Vetted plumbers, welders, steel fixers, construction workers, technicians, drivers and operators available on flexible terms.
detail.projectMgmtDesc: End-to-end coordination of equipment, crews and logistics so your project team can focus on delivery, not procurement.

process.title: A Simple, Transparent Process
process.step1Desc: Share your project scope, timeline and equipment needs with our team.
process.step2Desc: We recommend the right equipment and crew, with transparent pricing.
process.step3Desc: Equipment, operators and crews are deployed to site on schedule.
process.step4Desc: Ongoing coordination and maintenance support until project close-out.
